title: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasurys as Gulf War fallout stokes currency fears
summary_full: The selloff came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the Japanese yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.
